name: Tomato, Artichoke and Feta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Feta cheese; cut into half-inch cubes
2 large Tomatoes; cut into half-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the artichoke hearts in quarters on paper towels for 30 minutes.
2. Cut the feta cheese into half-inch cubes, slice the onion.
3. Place them in a large bowl and set aside.
4. Make the dressing: Stir red wine vinegar, salt, and garlic together. Add oregano, pepper, basil, and parsley; then slowly beat in olive oil. Pour the dressing over the feta and onions and toss well.
5. Add the drained artichoke hearts to the feta mixture and toss (can be prepared ahead to this point and kept refrigerated for several days).
6. When ready to serve, add tomato cubes and toss everything together.
SERVES: 8 to 12
